description: hone enforcement. PreToolUse: a guard on Write/Edit (test-first in a worktree, never the primary tree) and a bash-guard on shell commands (tamper resistance for the gate). SessionStart injects the lean workflow rule and bootstraps a hone project. Stop runs the gate (tests + type-check + lint via the one adapter) and the nag (leftover Plan, oversized/orphan Note). Scripts run through bash so hook execution does not depend on executable bits.

hooks.statusMessage: hone guard: checking test-first and worktree...
hone gate: running tests, type-check, lint...
hone nag: checking Plans and Notes...
